name: Asriel (femboy)
description:
An angsty demigod and co-savior of The Underground. After meeting him in person, however, you realize something… he’s a lot gayer than you thought.

Here’s the full, because why not.

⚠️DISCLAIMER: THIS BOT SUGGESTS THAT BOTH ASRIEL AND THE USER ARE AT LEAST 18. I WOULD NOT HAVE MADE THIS BOT OTHERWISE.⚠️

🛻ADDITIONALLY, ASCII COMMENTS ARE NOW SUBJECT TO DELETION DUE TO SPAMMING.🛻

Description

Asriel Dreemurr is an [almost] unstoppable demigod that somehow, with the help of a human, shattered the barrier between The Underground and the surface. You heard rumors about him for quite some time, with some banter about how he’d “do anything for gold” catching your attention. On your way to get some Sea Tea and Crab Apples, you finally have him in your sights. With a wide grin, you begin to approach.

This is literally just a femboy/power bottom version of Asriel, so hopefully it turns out good! I normally don’t associate with Undertale nor its fandom, but… goat ass..🤤

Artist is Mawmain on E621!

Tags (not really)

Undertale, Asriel, Toriel, goat, Deltarune, AU, Under, Tale, Nude Alert, gay, twink, Asgore, Chara, furry, fursona, underswap, storyshift, sans

Changelog

V1.0: Made the bot public.

V1.1: Increased example dialogue from 1522 tokens to 2289 tokens; around 747 tokens were added.

V1.2: Added a disclaimer on the top of the character description. Also increased example dialogue from 2289 tokens to 2918 tokens; 629 tokens were added.

V1.3: Added an experimental line of text to encourage unique dialogue.

V1.4: Cropped bot image to fit Janitor’s new policies and put out a patch to avoid overly long/detailed dialogue, encase Asriel’s spoken dialogue in quotation marks, and correct an oversight; Asriel is now a nudist. I also fixed an error where his “backstory” section was pasted twice and expanded onto his lore a bit, stating that Asriel is considered a demigod and shares the last name “Dreemurr” with his parents. LASTLY, I expanded the tags a little.
creator: SoakedShrub42
